center.name: 阿曼拜省
center.summary: 阿曼拜省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Planalto foliage-gleaner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The planalto foliage-gleaner is found in the southern planalto from Brazil's Mato Grosso state east to Bahia and south to Paraná and eastern Paraguay's Concepción and Amambay departments

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The planalto foliage-gleaner is found in the southern planalto from Brazil's Mato Grosso state east to Bahia and south to Paraná and eastern Paraguay's Concepción and Amambay departments
